name: Squaw Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 tsp Red Star active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, liquefy the milk, water, oil, honey, raisins, and brown sugar on high speed.
2. Combine the liquefied mixture with the remaining ingredients in the order listed by the manufacturer.
3. Select the light crust setting and press start.
Note: For Welbilt/DAK machines, add 2 tablespoons more water. For Panasonic/National machines (except), use 4 1/2 teaspoons yeast instead of 2 1/2 tsp yeast.
